---
title: "Lanoe Falconer (Author of \\""Mademoiselle Ixe\\"")"
---

## Lanoe Falconer (Author of \\""Mademoiselle Ixe\\"")

**Author:** Evelyn March-Phillipps
**Date:** 1915
**Imprint:** London: Nisbet

### Notes

A biography of Mary Elizabeth Hawker.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
